source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/2023 시험소 규격업데이트/HAD1717MC/Safety 접수자료 231219/A-TCF-5-015 HAD1717MC Basic Safety_Essential Performance.docx

document.title: Basic Safety, Essential Performance For X-ray Detector HAD1717MC, HAD1717MG
document.documentType: Basic Safety and Essential Performance report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Report A-TCF-5-015 Rev.0 defines basic safety, essential performance, and EMC pass/fail criteria for X-ray Detector models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports safety and EMC regulatory documentation by identifying essential performance criteria and test results for the listed detector models.
keyPoints: The product must be able to acquire an image within 5 seconds.
The acquired image should not have two Line Adjacent, Line Block, or No Display.
Listed EMC standards and test items are marked PASS.
Immunity pass/fail criteria are to be based on applicable part two standards or risk management and included in the risk management file.

entities.evidence: Prepared R&D team Lee, Dong Wook March/12/2018

entities.name: Lee, Dong Wook
entities.evidence: Prepared R&D team Lee, Dong Wook March/12/2018

concepts.name: Basic Safety
concepts.evidence: 1.1 BASIC SAFETY, ESSENTIAL PERFORMANCE and Pass/Fail Criteria as determined by the Manufacturer

concepts.name: Essential Performance
concepts.evidence: Description of BASIC SAFETY and ESSENTIAL PERFORMANCE

concepts.name: Acquisition Software
concepts.evidence: Operation check of the product can be monitored by using the acquisition software.

concepts.name: Risk Management File
concepts.evidence: These pass/fail criteria shall be included in the risk management file

concepts.name: Electromagnetic Immunity
concepts.evidence: Note: Specific, detailed immunity pass/fail criteria, shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management, for immunity with regard to em disturbances.

evidence.claim: The document is Report No. A-TCF-5-015 Rev.0.
The document was initially issued on March/12/2018.
evidence.evidenceText: Revision History Revision Date Description 0 March/12/2018 Initially issued

evidence.claim: The report applies to X-ray Detector models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
Operation check of the product can be monitored using acquisition software.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation check of the product can be monitored by using the acquisition software.

evidence.claim: The product must be able to acquire an image within 5 seconds.
evidence.evidenceText: - Must be able to acquire image within 5 seconds

evidence.claim: The acquired image should not have two Line Adjacent, Line Block, or No Display.
evidence.evidenceText: - The acquired image should not have two Line Adjacent, Line Block, or No Display.

evidence.claim: Dark image acquisition using Acquisition Software is used to evaluate whether there is no image problem.
evidence.evidenceText: When acquiring a Dark image using Acquisition Software in the evaluation of the following criteria, there should be no problem with the image.

evidence.claim: CISPR 11 Conducted Emission on AC mains Port and Radiated Emission results are PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: CISPR 11 Conducted Emission on AC mains Port PASS Radiated Emission PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-3-2 Harmonic Current Emission on AC Mains Input Port result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-3-2 Harmonic Current Emission on AC Mains Input Port PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-3-3 Voltage Fluctuations and Flicker on AC Mains Input Port result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-3-3 Voltage Fluctuations and Flicker on AC Mains Input Port PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-2 Electrostatic Discharge Immunity result is PASS.
IEC 61000-4-3 Radio-frequency electromagnetic field amplitude modulated immunity result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-3 Radio-frequency electromagnetic field Amplitude modulated Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-4 Fast Transients Immunity result is PASS.
IEC 61000-4-5 Surges Immunity result is PASS.
IEC 61000-4-6 Radio-frequency common mode Immunity result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-6 Radio-frequency common mode Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-8 Power frequency magnetic fields result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-8 Power frequency magnetic fields PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-11 Voltage Dips and Voltage Interruptions Immunity result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-11 Voltage Dips, Voltage Interruptions Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: For electrostatic discharges, essential performance and basic safety must not be affected before, during, and after the test; performance degradation that does not affect them is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Before, during, and after the test, the essential performance and basic safety shall not be affected, and the performance degradation which does not affect essential performance and basic safety is PASS.

evidence.claim: Specific detailed immunity pass/fail criteria shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management and included in the risk management file.
evidence.evidenceText: Note: Specific, detailed immunity pass/fail criteria, shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management, for immunity with regard to em disturbances. These pass/fail criteria shall be included in the risk management file

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal is only 'general'.
Review and approval rows list roles but no names, dates, or signatures are present in the extracted text.
Source text includes apparent OCR or preprocessing defects such as 'ltage Dips and Interruptions' and lowercase 'em disturbances'.
